questionHtml:
The diagram shows, for a region on the Earth’s surface, the incident, radiated and reflected intensities of the solar radiation.

What is the albedo of the region?

A.  14

B.  13

C.  34

D.  1

meta.title: The diagram shows, for a region on the Earth’s surface, the incident, radiated and reflected intensities of the solar radiation. What is the albedo of the region? A. 14 B. 13 C. 34
breadcrumbLabels: B. The particulate nature of matter
